description: Execute the OpenICE automated test suite for the project located at /opt/openice/mdpnp/ and generate a deployment readiness report. The report must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/test_execution_report.txt and include the current Git commit hash, a list of modules tested, a statistical summary (Total/Passed/Failed/Skipped), details of any failures (Class/Method/Error), and a concluding recommendation on deployment readiness.
